{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220342226D42E414253758F52350"}"},"total":486},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7438883304861123390","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我去，我才发现我看到现在还没有五星，这么好看我是干啥吃的，太符合我的标准了，我感觉以后看见其他女强我都不想看了，描写的都很细腻，每一个人物都有刻画出来，不是只突出主角，主角的情感描述更是没话说，反正我文词不好，但是我超爱，入股不亏，不过很难再遇见了比这更好的了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732005584,"group_id":"7395066182178458686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在书中可以尽情发挥自己想象中的美好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2iw1iRFFhM2vOroo0Sq7BHGaLO1NP4z4tjPd1cE8eIf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/56da48701a7e4df2b2ff8abbfabebb2a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703309&x-signature=vQiEA913tVVArILRnvPXLusJ8Yc%3D","user_id":"4116220137713511","user_name":"爱田华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4116220137713511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395066182178458686","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主（标签有毒！别信！）、男女双强、女宠男、双洁、言情文、剧情流。】
【美强惨病弱黛式男主vs冷拽飒御姐妈系女主，双向奔赴，双向救赎。】
一个孤独行走于世间的空气人于病榻上无声死去，一个病魔缠身的Bug大佬口吐鲜血，呢喃着“姐姐，我等不到你了”遗憾而亡。
再次睁眼时，萧无劫穿成了自己书里，自己为原型塑造的病秧子男主。
自己写的书，却因自己的穿越导致自己也看不懂了。他代替本该死去的男主继续存在，风华绝代的女主姐姐宠他无度，要命的是这本书尚未完结，自己便已经于另一个世界挂了……
他虽然是作者，但他也不知道故事和每个人物的最终结局是什么！
他还不知道的是天命女主楚璃月在他穿越那天做了一个梦，梦里萧无劫口吐鲜血，目光涣散，唤着：“姐姐，我等不到你了……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7a3b64307aa6b89f4fae31ae1123b922~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"深山风月人","author_id":"","book_id":"7395066182178458686","book_name":"病秧子迎风倒，冷艳总裁怀中宝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7395071971429450302","read_count":"11925","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1054977"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"490","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,穿越,多女主,穿书,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0b3d666f8d59388c60a48ad6b2e730bf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306142&x-signature=qDGw4cSCZ6tYLKJ%2Fa4V3pJha%2Bns%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"175513593189256","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"418"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220342226D42E414253758F52350"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":49718,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3663},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1732011019,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7404034724964434713","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊，真的很好看啊，发现一个宝藏作者，看的时候可以明显感觉到大大的文笔在变好（没有说刚开始不好的意思哦），情节也很连贯，而且其中的句子也很美，乖宝也很可爱，又茶又娇好喜欢，希望大大多多更新哦[求爆更][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723889882,"group_id":"7395066182178458686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6aAVKqbzk9oKXJyBX72tz+Gqoro7RnbLhaxOa0/w5h4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/22b23343413a487892bb3ff47c2e633c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710095&x-signature=ttYgx8oCIphCrRYr0bO%2BplJXQ2o%3D","user_id":"1605724295660670","user_name":"嘟嘟噜噜噜~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1605724295660670","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708179681,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395066182178458686","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主（标签有毒！别信！）、男女双强、女宠男、双洁、言情文、剧情流。】
【美强惨病弱黛式男主vs冷拽飒御姐妈系女主，双向奔赴，双向救赎。】
一个孤独行走于世间的空气人于病榻上无声死去，一个病魔缠身的Bug大佬口吐鲜血，呢喃着“姐姐，我等不到你了”遗憾而亡。
再次睁眼时，萧无劫穿成了自己书里，自己为原型塑造的病秧子男主。
自己写的书，却因自己的穿越导致自己也看不懂了。他代替本该死去的男主继续存在，风华绝代的女主姐姐宠他无度，要命的是这本书尚未完结，自己便已经于另一个世界挂了……
他虽然是作者，但他也不知道故事和每个人物的最终结局是什么！
他还不知道的是天命女主楚璃月在他穿越那天做了一个梦，梦里萧无劫口吐鲜血，目光涣散，唤着：“姐姐，我等不到你了……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7a3b64307aa6b89f4fae31ae1123b922~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"深山风月人","author_id":"","book_id":"7395066182178458686","book_name":"病秧子迎风倒，冷艳总裁怀中宝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7395071971429450302","read_count":"11925","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1054977"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"490","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,穿越,多女主,穿书,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0b3d666f8d59388c60a48ad6b2e730bf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306142&x-signature=qDGw4cSCZ6tYLKJ%2Fa4V3pJha%2Bns%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"175513593189256","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220342226D42E414253758F52350"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6613,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":12782},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1723891154,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400457390567408408","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体不错，挺有意思，戳到我萌点，男主病但强，女主强强强，男主在女主面前柔弱被宠，表面女宠男，实际属于双强组合，主打爽文。就是对不可能产生感情关系的女配从相貌到性格到对男主的忠诚和才华描写的过于美好，属于个人阅读小毒点，只撩不娶（撩是指撩到作为读者的我，看文会不自觉带入男主视角）。还是鼓励一下吧，下次作者写1v1,女配描写不那么吸引人的新文一定追。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723063645,"group_id":"7395066182178458686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8Aeoeo8Y/bhV2we4sSKHkoOax9+jCZ8CERGjEHYhjc9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2747037494023095","user_name":"喜欢蝽虫的闻人月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2747037494023095","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395066182178458686","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主（标签有毒！别信！）、男女双强、女宠男、双洁、言情文、剧情流。】
